title: Execute platform readiness baseline

summary: SOW Phase 2 platform readiness gate executed. Initial baseline captured with 3 PASS, 1 WARN, 3 FAIL. Report at docs/sow-phase2-readiness-baseline.md. FAIL dimensions identified for remediation in subsequent iterations.
